entry.title: Re: PO Form - MM_PUR_PURCHASE_ORDER
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check the below blog , This blog includes frequently asked questions related to generation and configuration of purchase order outputs. One of the questions in the blog addresses the adding of supplier material number in the purchase order output and the probable reasons why this is not appearing and how to solve it.


https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/faqs-for-purchase-order-output-management/ba-p/12836715

entry.title: Advanced PR and PO (ME51N / ME21N)?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Could you please support me in How I Can change the filed selection status in Advanced PR and PO (ME51N / ME21N)?

Please note I tried to implement the BADI Change of filed control for the purchase order header but still not working in the manage purchase order and is not reflected in the create purchase order - advanced (ME21N).

entry.title: Re: Advanced PR and PO (ME51N / ME21N)?
entry.content:
Hi,

Please follow the below KBAs -

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3268822

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3345421

In these KBAs, are mentioned the BADIs that need to be used for field control along with sample, please go to the App Custom logic to find more details and an example.

entry.title: Re: Can I download SAP Business One 10 without S-User ID?
entry.content:
Hi,

Are you not able to find the Trial Version of B1 Version 10?

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Add fright price condition details
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Could you please assist me in How I can add fright price condition details (Supplier in fright condition) in the PO print output?

In case I use a copy from the standard form for the KSA (MM_PUR_PURCHASE_ORDER_SA) country, but I can`t find the price condition details (Header & items) in the data hierarchy?

entry.title: I am trying to get the CR 2011 Trial license key for my application (3.5 Framework)
entry.content:
I am trying to get the CR 2011 Trial license key for my application now. 

The application were built based on .Net 3.5 Framework and we already using crystal report of lower version.

entry.title: Re: Add fright price condition details
entry.content:
Freight can be added as surcharge (absolute or procentual value) in the pricing conditions. Furthermore, freight for a purchase order belongs to the master data in the category pricing. The system uses this as well as prices, discounts for materials and business partners, surcharges, sales taxes, and planned costs for customs to calculate a net value in a business document.

If your Condition Type isn't printing in Purchase Order output form I would suggest to go through the below resources :

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-setup-po-print-for-pricing-condition-and-text/qaq-p/12775521

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2951747

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2951747

entry.title: External Number Assignment for Batch
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a few materials that our client wants to maintain and check inventory based on their material group, Vendor, and the Last GR date. Is there any way like BADI to create an external number range for batch management in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud to facilitate this requirement?

entry.title: Re: External Number Assignment for Batch
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you explored the extensibility option : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/2660601672564e6a869fd7dc20fffa1b.html

There is a BADI External Batch Number Range Selection (LOBM_EXT_BATCH_NR_RANGE_SELECT)

You can use BAdI External Batch Number Range Selection

to suppress checking externally provided batch numbers,

to specify which number range (defined by object, sub-object and interval) is used for the number check.

Please check if this helps you with your requirement.

entry.title: Create Purchase Requisition - Advanced ME51N
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In the standard system where catalogs are being used, we can only select catalog from fiori application Manage Purchase Requisitions - Professional. But we cannot create PR with catalog in Create Purchase Requisition - Advanced (ME51N). Is there any enhancement that will allow users to create catalog PR in the ME51N screen? If you see below for Create Purchase Order - Advanced (ME21N)screen in S4HC, catalog can be used but the same option is not in ME51N screen.

entry.title: Re: how to implement multiple gst rates for HSN based GST...
entry.content:
thanks prasoon for promt response

but with point 1 i will only be able to maintain 1 tax percent at a time for given material type.

right now with existing config i can do the same.

what i need is to maintain multiple rates for 1 hsn code/material types at a point.

let me know if any clarification required.

entry.title: Re: Create Purchase Requisition - Advanced ME51N
entry.content:
Hi,

The catalogue that you have mentioned is an internal catalog which is meant for cross catalog search, this is only available in the Purchase Requisition applications, 1. Manage Purchase Requisition Professional and 2. My Purchase Requisition New.

Currently this is not the part of the advanced tile as behavior for the same exactly matches the old ERP transaction ME51N, so as workaround you can use FIORI apps "Manage Purchase Requisition Professional" or "My Purchase Requisition New" for the same.

In case this is business critical to you then you can raise a new feature request for the same. Kindly make use of the SAP Customer Influence

entry.title: Invalid column name error when passing Name parameter
entry.content:
HI  I am trying to pass parameter first_name and when i pass in query and create parameter then this shows error

this is the query which used 

and this is the error i receive

 

whereas when i use this query for  Customer_ID parameter this works but not works with Name.. where is the mistake? why not working with Name

entry.title: Activation subscription SAP Ariba Buying
entry.content:
Hi,

I had a problem with the activation of the SAP Ariba Buying subscription (via booster) on SAP BTP, the nature of problem (missing entilemeent for guided buying and procurment).
Could you please explain why I can't find the entilement to use this subscription as i want to use the Ariba Buying 360 functionalities on our SAP S4 HANA CLOUD Demo platform for a customer demonstration.

entry.title: Re: Activation subscription SAP Ariba Buying
entry.content:
Hi,

This is because the subaccount is not entitled for the necessary service plan.

Could you please refer to KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003321970

entry.title: Create supplier invoice - Advanced
entry.content:
Dear all,

When we register a supplier document from the 'Create supplier invoice - Advanced' app, how can we view the FI document?

The resulting document number is MM. We need to display the FI document number as well.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Build Process Automation - centralize the decision making for all!
entry.content:
Nice one! I also like the guidance on API Calls for Decisions 🙂

And yes sven...you shoud go to the gym!

entry.title: Re: Create supplier invoice - Advanced
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for reaching out!

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, it's not currently feasible to display the FI Document within the "Create Supplier Invoice - Advanced" app when the MM document is saved as there are no user parameters available for this purpose.

You can, however, review the FI documents via the "Display Line Items for a GL account" (as indicated below) or through the "Display Document Flow" app.

entry.title: Re: Retrieve Persisted Payload using MessageID in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Below might help you if you have used message persist step only and in case payloads are logged directly in MPL using script then currently there are no apis's retrieve the same.

For Message Persist please refer below.

1) https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/persist-messages 

2) https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-cpi-retrieve-persisted-messages-through-iflow-by-consuming-api-neo/ba-p/13473876

entry.title: Achieving Real-Time S/4HANA Cloud Data Replication in SAP Datasphere Without DP Agent
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm looking for a solution to archieve real-time data replication from S/4HANA Cloud to SAP Datasphere without using an on-premise Data Provisioning Agent. Without a DP agent, currently it seems we're limited to Data Flows and Replication Flows, which don't support real-time replication or remote table access for views. Is this right?

Has anyone managed to bypass the need for a DP Agent to enable real-time replication and remote table functionality? I've checked the roadmap but found no leads (https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?range=2023Q1-2025Q1&PRODUCT=73555000100800002141#Q1%202024). 

Best regards
Tim

entry.title: Agent statis is disconnected in Web idea
entry.content: I have installed dpagent on my laptop and agent was properly registered .But now agent status is disconnected in Web idea.Further can anybody help in ssl configuration for dpagent

entry.title: SQL code: -10692 occurred while accessing table
entry.content:
Hi 

I got a dump while accessing a table dynamically, can someone please suggest what exactly is the problem here and how can it be resolved.

 

 

CREATE DATA lt_ref TYPE TABLE OF (p_lv_tabname).
    IF lt_ref IS BOUND.
      ASSIGN lt_ref->* TO <fs_tab>.
      IF <fs_tab> IS ASSIGNED.

        " Fetching records of entered table
        SELECT * FROM (p_lv_tabname) INTO TABLE <fs_tab>.

 

 

This dump comes when I execute the select query.

Below is the table from which i am fetching data.

Regards,

Farhan

Arun

entry.title: Re: No values returned (Graphical Mapping SAP CPI)
entry.content: We found the solution. The basic type in XSD was different than the one in the XML (test file for simulation)

entry.title: Re: Improving the Recruiter Experience: Explore the Reimagined Applicant Management Tool - Available
entry.content:
Hi @amphill,

Is there a sunset date announced yet for Legacy applicant workbench? Also, please let us know when would be Redesigned Applicant Workbench would be a universal push from SAP. Is there a date announced as well for that?

Thank you,

Dilip

entry.title: Re: Can I download SAP Business One 10 without S-User ID?
entry.content: Thanks, Jitin Chawla for your response. I don't have S-User ID and I don't find any link without S-User ID to download SAP Business One 10 Trial Version.

entry.title: If returns <null> (Graphical Mapping SAP CPI)
entry.content:
the boolean comparison (equals(String) should return true only if PARVW=RS). If this is the case map NAME2. If false, map empty constant. As the target field NOME has a 1..1 relation, this is needed. 

 

However even if the comparison is true, <null> is returned. What is causing this?

entry.title: Re: Output Management in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
HI Stan_Byrd,

Yes, an output can be scheduled. If dispatch time is set to scheduled instead of immediately, the output will be processed via batch job and not sent immediately after saving the document.
The dispatch time can be defined in the Output Parameter Determination app, in the determination steps Output type.
You might want to refer to the 1LQ set up guide and SAP Help documentation.
Best regards,
Katalin

entry.title: Delimit an end date for wage type in the view V_512W_D.
entry.content:
Dear SAPMGurus,

 

How do you delimit an end date for wage type in the view V_512W_D.

entry.title: Re: select multiple SALV Rows
entry.content: Yeah I think it is also not possible to delete a comment/answer neither.

entry.title: LTMOM : Add to Transport Request : Combination of objects with and without Transport Organizer ...
entry.content:
Dear All,

In LTMOM (Object Modeler), I do not succeed in adding a Migration Project to a Transport Request.

Error Message : Combination of objects with  and without Transport Organizer monitoring.

 

Clicking on the "Documentation"-icon of the error message shows : 

Diagnosis

Object R3TR PE02 5791CFCF31D31EEEB49949E0808E9684, which is not checked by the Transport Organizer, and object R3TR TRUL Z1SSQQQTO9M4RFY24QX, which is checked, cannot be edited in the same request.

Only objects of the same type can be edited in the same request.

entry.title: MRP live vs classical MRP
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone suggest a solution to this question?

Which of the following is an advantage of MRP Live and NOT available in classical MRP?
There are 2 correct answers to this question.

MRP live can create production order automatically
MRP live can propose alternative solutions
MRP Live can plan materials with recursive BOMs
MRP Live can priorities demand from sales orders

Thank you,

BR,

entry.title: Re: Deprecated features in Latest Goal Management
entry.content:
Hello Vanessa,

We use a table for tasks on our goals. We have tens of thousands of active goals that link to live performance forms. Are you saying that the tasks will no longer be visible either in the goal plan or in the PM forms in the latest goal management?

You suggested  in a previous comment that to get around this we run a report to export all the goal and task data - I assume in Adhoc reports?

Then we create the milestone fields to replicate the task fields (if possible) and import the data?

Will this work for active goal plans and live PM forms or will we have to create new goal plans and link them to the live PM forms?

This is a major issue for us.

 

Thanks for your help,

Julia

entry.title: Unfortunately, our vacation business rule does not round to 0.5 days
entry.content:
Here’s an overview regarding our accrual rule dilemma. My challenges are highlighted in red.

 

Our Requirements for the accrual in the UK:

  • All full-time employees have 25 vacation days per year
    • The 25 days are pro-rated based on the job information: Working days per week
      • E.g. 3 Working days per week  25/3*5=15
  • In the UK legislatively the calculation for an employee’s first year of employment, is one twelfth of the company entitlement on the first day of each month and we would always round up to the nearest half day or full day. Examples:
    • Hire date on 4th March: 25/12 months x 10 remaining months left in the year = 20.8 , rounded up to 21 days leave
    • Termination date on 31st March: 25/12 months x 3 months worked = 6,25, rounded up to 6.5 days leave
  • Periods with parental leave are not regarded for the calculation (optional requirements, we could take this out if it makes it easier)

 

We currently have the following rule in the system:

Results are:

  • Correct: Employees get 25 days per year
  • Correct: When entiring an event (e.g. Termination), the balance shows 1 decimal, e.g. 6.3
  • Incorrect: For a termination on e.g. 31st March, the rounding is going from 6.25 to the next higher decimal, 6.3 instead of 6.5  it should always move to the next “half-day”, 6  6.5  7 …
  • Incorrect: We can’t find the solution that it always rounds up. Any option we tried, was rounding down if it was <.5 (e.g. 6.01  6.00 instead of 6.5)

You shared the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2321693/e --> I tried it, but as also stated in their description it also rounds down and not always up (e.g. 6.2  6.00 instead of 6.5)

 

You also shared the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2337100/e  I tried the exact rule, however I don’t get any accrual balance at all. Maybe I need to add something in addition. Also from reading the rule, I can’t find the logic, where it would define, that it’s always rounded up to the next half day. (meaning 6.2  6.5 instead of 6.3).

 

For the note, SAP (ticket is in the 5th cycle now) shared this documentation with me:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_TIME_TRACKING/6619e553226244d89872529ae3f8df34/5fb83abb25b6421d9aadaa55cbe512c0.html?q=Round%20Function&version=2211

 

This seems to be the correct rule, according to the text specification. However I was unable to build this since the marked information is not available in my dropdowns:

entry.title: Source inspection with multiple inspection results
entry.content:
Master data

Quality info record

The Q-Info Record is utilized to initiate a source inspection lot for a specific material/vendor and plant combination.

To create quality info record go to QI01 with selection of material and supplier

  1. Active “Source inspection” in inspection control tab
  2. Set inspection control “Inspection active regardless of supplier certification”, If you not select this inspection lot will not be create at GR.

 

  1. If you prefer to generate an inspection lot upon Goods Receipt (GR) for a source inspection lot, do not select the checkbox labelled "Source Insp. No GR".
  2. Set inspection type 0102 for source inspection

 

  1. Set validity of quality info record in release until which is in release tab.

 

  1. Then save.

Material master

  1. QM active in material master go to MM02
  2. Open material master
  3. Set active “QM in Procurement Is Active”

 

  1. Active inspection type 0102 Source Inspection.

Create inspection plan

(For record one time result inspection plan will be same as you created before for multi time result recording on one source inspection lot follow below procedure)

  1. To create inspection, go to QP01
  2. Set usage 52 GR Source Inspection
  3. Overall status 4 Released (General)
  4. Set Inspection point according to requirement (I am selecting Quantity wise).

 

  1.  Attaché MICs according to your testing plan
  2. Set sampling procedure which have “Other inspection point” 
  3. Create sampling procedure from QDV1 if not created  

 

  1. Set others in inspection point.

Transaction

  1. Create purchase order
  2. Create purchase order go to ME21N with selection of same vender which you create Quality info record,

 

  1. To trigger the lot manually you need to have some open purchase orders for the material/plant/vendor.

 

  1. Go to transaction QI07 and give the material code, vendor, plant and opening period.
  2. Add material code and supplier
  3. Then execute

 

  1. Select scheduled order line go to select create inspection lot then press save.

 

For run on background job to create source inspection lot automatically try QA51

  1. Go to inspection lot.
  2. Select inspection lot.
  3. Enter Qty and date.

 

  1. Record inspection results against inspection point

 

  1. At the time of usage decision, you can check multiple results Qty and date wise

 

Do result recording for each inspection point.

when product is finally accepted give usage decision.

after usage decision you can not record results.

entry.title: Re: मनी फाइन कस्टमर केयर नंबर // 8961182879 /// 814658724...

entry.title: Integrating Document Structure into SAP BO 4.2 BI Launchpad Homepage Using BI Workplace
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working with SAP BusinessObjects BI 4.2-SP9 and have customized our BI Launchpad homepage utilizing the BI Workplace tools. 

I intend to replace the current content in the section where "Recently Viewed Documents" are displayed with the complete document structure found under the Documents tab, encompassing all documents and folders.

Could anyone share guidance or provide instructions on how to achieve this replacement using BI Workplace tools? My goal is to seamlessly substitute the existing content in this part of the BI Launchpad homepage with the entire document structure.

I appreciate any insights or suggestions you can offer. Thank you in advance for your support.

Norman

entry.title: Pre-Screening Question: Can Recruiter answer those on behalf of candidate?
entry.content:
Hi guys,

my client is facing the following situation: Candidate applies for requisition "A" including mandatory (knockout) pre-screening questions (which have been filled out "correctly" by candidate). The Recruiter receives the application for "A" but will forward candidate to requisition "B" because of a better match. Requisition "B" also has mandatory (knockout) pre-screening questions adapted to it. Now, my client cannot forward the candidate on the Talent Pipeline (from Default to Screening status), because the Candidate did not answer those questions on "B".

My client does not want to contact the candidate again in order to ask her/him to fill out the questions again, just for another requisition (the questions are specifically the same ones). This is a "bad" user/candidate experience.

I learned that there is no way to transfer answered pre-screening-questions from "A" to "B".

We also tried to make the MulitStage field (for status default) "questionResponse" editable for the Recruiter (write permission) which did not work - Recruiter cannot change the Candidate Portlet. We also tried to give Permissions on the feature permission "candQuestion" for Recruiters, which did not work.

It seems like there is no option than contacting the candidate again. We would like to have an option for the Recruiter to answer the questions on behalf of the candidate.

Does anyone have a solution? 

 

Thank you so much 

Lukas

entry.title: Invalid number of local collections. Open an incident while creating custom business object
entry.content:
Hi all,

I faced an error when tried to create a custom business object in S/4 HANA cloud. Before this error, I was getting error Items of type XXX must not be edited in this tenant which get resolved by the notes: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3248190

What step did I missed out to activate to allow me to create custom business object?

Thanks. 

Regards,

Ben

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Rule to be implemented on blocking deliveries and issues of goods linked to a released order (OVA8 c
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a need, when unblocking orders blocked due to exceeding the credit limit (VKM4), we have noticed that deliveries and the issue of goods are sometimes blocked, we want to prevent the blocking of deliveries and issue of goods , if the amount and quantity of the goods on the delivery or issue of goods is less than that of the order (whatever the deviation as long as it is less than the order amount), and then the tolerance on the amount of the order released?.

 

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 3
entry.content:
Thank you very much Bruno for your precious help!
I could complete successfully the week:

entry.title: Re: EWM Staging Request error in SAP DM
entry.content:
I think i found the issue. Had same problem today with same error message: You cannot use batch split positions in your production order. You need to assign the batches directly to the main-positions of the component list. --> Seems to be a bug in DM/Staging message.

Please let me know if this is solving your issue.

 

Kind regards,

Daniel

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Stock management - Difference between GUID_ST...
entry.content: Hi Daniil, I am very interessted in the technical structure of EWM. Thats the major reason. I don't have a inconsistency I just wanted to know the behaviour of the system in general. Thank you very much for the explanations!

entry.title: Re: Multiple POD Plugins on the same Plugin Container in POD Designer within SAP Digital Manufacturi
entry.content:
Hi Manoel, 

Good post, as we already got used from your previous posts. Thank you very much for that!

I was wondering , if there is any functionality in POD designer that would allow us to define an action button and/ or a plug in relevant , dynamically. I another words, with an example: in the same POD either see the option of data collection or not, based on the assignment or not of a data collection group to the activity being recorded. That would save the operator's time, by preventing it from clicking in unnecessary button's (efficiency-driven) or avoid creating activity-specific PODs . 

Thanks a lot. 

Best regards, 

Raquel

entry.title: Re: Clearing of Accounts in s4/HANA: Customer against Vendor and vice versa
entry.content: Very informative with complete understanding.

entry.title: Is there a way to change the bulk load option for all jobs?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are using Data Services for ETL.

and We also used the bulk load option in the Job.

We want to change the bulk load option on every job.

But There are lots of job on Data Services.

I would like to ask if I can find a job that only uses the bulk load option among the numerous jobs.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create graphic elements in the process map
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to create this sample process map in our signavio.

How can I integrate icons and other graphical elements into the process map?

Many thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to change the bulk load option for all...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

The only way to change the bulk loader option is to manually edit each job. Refer- https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-use-bulk-loading-option-in-ds/qaq-p/11731741

There is no global option to change the default value of the bulk load parameter for all the jobs.

Thankyou.

entry.title: Setting up a Client Certificate-Based Authentication between EC Payroll and SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Transitioning to Certificate-Based Authentication for your EC Payroll and SAP Integration Suite Integration

Discover the shift in cybersecurity as SAP recommends certificate-based authentication over traditional username/password methods.

 

Contents

  • Introduction
  • Assumption
  • Process flow
  • Configuration guide
    • EC Payroll: Exporting the certificate from EC Payroll
    • SAP BTP: Importing the EC Payroll’s certificate to SAP Integration Suite
      • Add the service Process Integration Runtime to your subaccount
      • Create the service instance
      • Create a service key
  • Connection Testing
    • SAP Integration Suite: Integration flow for testing
    • EC Payroll: Make a connection test
  • Finally…

 

Introduction

As you may know, SAP advises using certificate-based authentication instead of user/password authentication, and they have good reason to do so. Because compared to the traditional username and password combination, it's a far more secure option.

So, the purpose of this blog is to instruct you on configuring the client certificate-based authentication between EC Payroll system and SAP Integration Suite.

I know (and understand) that most people can follow a guide from SAP. But as you can see, the SAP Help page has an extensive amount of content. Therefore, the goal of this blog is to help you to visualize what SAP is describing in its configuration guide.

References:

  • https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL_PAYROLL/185f14fbe60d4bbb8d7d5e4f8d89b24b/93aae9b2ff0444fdae4a188d1711589e.html
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/client-certificate-authentication-for-integration-flow-processing

 

Assumption

  • Using Employee Central Payroll (EC Payroll)
  • Using SAP Integration Suite on SAP BTP
  • Most importantly, you have basic knowledge of EC Payroll, SAP Integration Suite, and SAP BTP

 

Process flow

 

Configuration guide

EC Payroll: Exporting the certificate from EC Payroll

These steps are similar if you have previously configured the Point-to-Point data replication between EC Payroll and SuccessFactors applications.

  1. Go to Trust Manager (tcode STRUST), then select the SSL client (100_SD).
  2. Double-click on your own certificate
  3. Export the certificate in the Base64 format

 

SAP BTP: Importing the EC Payroll’s certificate to SAP Integration Suite

Here comes the tricky parts.

The following actions must be taken if you are unlucky enough that all necessary services have already been enabled in SAP BTP.

 

Add the service Process Integration Runtime to your subaccount.

Under your subaccount’s entitlements, add a new service plan.

Search for the service Process Integration Runtime, and then select the below plans.

 

Save it.

 

Create the service instance

Go to Services & Instances and Subscriptions, then click Create.

Under the new instance creation, select the below information.

  • Service: Process Integration Runtime
  • Plan: integration-flow
  • Runtime Environment: Cloud Foundry
  • Space: <if you don’t have space yet, create it>

 

You can use the default values under the parameters tab. Technically, the role ESBMessaging.send will be granted to those who have the client certificate.

Now, we are ready to create it.

 

Create a service key

Under the newly created instance, click on Create Service Key.

Select the key type as External Certificate and then copy the EC Payroll’s certificate to External Certificate.

 

Here we go.

 

Connection Testing

SAP Integration Suite: Integration flow for testing

For testing purposes, you can utilize either your integration flow or the SAP standard-delivered integration packages. In my case, I employ my custom integration flow.

 

EC Payroll: Make a connection test

I create an RFC connection to SAP Integration Suite.

Make sure you choose the SSL certificate that you exported in the first step under the Logon & Security tab.

After you make a connection test, you should receive the successful HTTP response (status 200).

 

Finally…

There’s nothing lasts forever as well as the certificate. The certificate will usually expire after a year.

Setting up the notification for expiring certificates is therefore advised.

  • Configuration guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RELEASE_INFORMATION/9da5856ba3dc42bc8f9c050c42cf3d51/4d434c23ef65419799bd90f185743185.html

entry.title: SAP MII SSCE SQL query displayed as a number
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have got fixed sql query prepared in SAP MII 15.4.1.43. This query is fetching data for one specyfic day. I have 3 colums. First one is timestamp, second is sfc, third is quantity. I would like to use this simple query is SAP MII SSCE. Idea is to display this query as a single number which would be a sum of quantity column. Is it possible? Or schould I create baseKPI for that?

entry.title: Keep your core Clean - Next SAP S/4HANA Strategy
entry.content:
Keeping the core clean refers to the practice of minimizing customization and modifications to the core ERP system, such as SAP S/4HANA, and leveraging cloud-based services provided by SAP BTP for additional functionalities, extensions, and innovation.

This session is provided by the Kolkata community. Speaker: Gairik Acharya
@Gairik 

If you are interested to get to know more about the local community in Kolkata, please join the Kolkata Group.

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 3
entry.content: Or you can use the built in mock user of ‘Alice’ - no password. https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/authentication#mock-users

entry.title: facing the issue during HANA SF Incentive management connectivity
Error: Authentication kind "jwt" configured, but no XSUAA instance bound
entry.content:
Hello,

I was simply trying to deploy sample cap project to BTP CF but every time it failed with deployment, with the following reason: Error: Authentication kind "jwt" configured, but no XSUAA instance bound to

I can see the error comes all the way from node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/auth/jwt-auth.js.

The project I created from template with minimal option I chose, and I didn't want to attach any security to my app. This works fine while testing locally but deploying it to BTP ending up with the above error.

Tried with some earlier versions of @Sap/cds but no luck. Is this a known error?

Can someone kindly confirm? or may I am missing some basics!

- Thanks, Somnath
